headlines.title: Trump says new Air Force One will be sent away for upgrades, amid security concerns
headlines.description: President Trump said the Air Force One plane that was donated by Qatar will be sent away for upgrades, amid swirling concerns about its security features.

headlines.title: Top Maine Senate candidates end campaigns as Troy Jackson builds Democratic support
headlines.description: Former state Senate President Troy Jackson is racking up support to become Maine’s next Democratic Senate nominee, with one of his top opponents, Shenna Bellows, ending her campaign on Sunday.

headlines.title: Usha Vance gives birth to fourth child
headlines.description: Second lady Usha Vance gave birth Sunday to her fourth child, Vice President JD Vance announced on X. “We are excited to announce that our baby boy, Alec Neel Vance, was born this morning,” Vance said in a statement.

headlines.title: JD and Usha Vance Welcome Fourth Child, Alec Neel Vance
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance and his wife Usha welcomed their fourth child, Alec Neel Vance, on Sunday. Usha is the first woman sine the 1870s to give birth while her husband is vice president.

headlines.title: India’s Cockroach Janta Party movement grows as thousands of protesters gather
headlines.description: India’s Cockroach Janta Party movement grows as thousands of protesters gather for a march demanding education reforms. The cockroach movement began after national medical school entrance exams were leaked.

headlines.title: U.S. service member killed in Northern Iraq, says U.S. Central Command
headlines.description: The U.S. military announced it recovered unidentified human remains while searching for an American service member reported missing after an Iranian missile and drone attack in Jordan, as another U.S. service member was killed in a separate incident in Iraq. NBC News' Julie Tsirkin and Keir Simmons report.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Rep. Ralph Norman launches campaign to replace Lindsey Graham in Senate race
headlines.description: Rep. Ralph Norman, R-S.C., announced Saturday that he plans to run in the special Senate primary election to fill the late GOP Sen. Lindsey Graham’s seat.

headlines.title: Wisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez drops out of the governor’s race
headlines.description: Her exit prompted Milwaukee County Executive David Crowley to revive his campaign and jump back into the wide-open Democratic primary in the battleground state.

headlines.title: Trump fumes over Canadian wildfire smoke and issues tariff threat
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Friday pledged to hold Canada responsible for costs associated with unhealthy air quality in the U.S. due to spreading smoke from the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Paul Pelosi charged with misdemeanor hit-and-run after hitting parked car
headlines.description: Pelosi, who’s married to Democratic Rep. Nancy Pelosi, previously pleaded guilty to driving under the influence in a 2022 car crash.
